action_items.context: Mental health and anxiety support with Ms. Sarah

critical_updates.details: No police contact or new legal issues. Completing all daily system check-ins on time.
Maintains two jobs (hotel and restaurant). Has been stable at the hotel for four months working mostly day shifts under manager Mr. Davis.
Apartment is stable. Rent is paid, heat is working, and the neighborhood is quiet. The daughters share their own room.
Attending weekly counseling sessions for anxiety with Ms. Sarah. Chose to maintain weekly frequency to stay grounded.
Submitted 3 consecutive clean UAs via Axiom clinic.
Children are doing well. 9-year-old son, Mateo, is starting soccer next week. Daughter Sofia is helping care for the 4-year-old daughter.

next_episode_context: Elena is demonstrating outstanding compliance across all supervision conditions. She maintains stable housing and two jobs (hotel and restaurant) to support her three children. She has submitted 3 consecutive clean UAs at Axiom, completes all daily automated check-ins flawlessly, and attends weekly counseling for anxiety with Ms. Sarah. Due to her perfect compliance, the PO waived her $20 probation fee for the current month. Her next scheduled visit is on the 14th of next month at 4:00 PM.
